Orchestra Experience - Surabaya

Sun, Jul 12 · 12:30 PM
Dyandra Convention Center Surabaya

KESEMPATAN TERAKHIR! ⚠️ DAPATKAN DISKON 15%!!!🔥</strong><br data-sfc-root="c" data-sfc-pl="|[]" data-sfc-cb="" data-complete="true" data-processed="true" data-copy-service-computed-style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);">Gunakan kode promo <strong data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-root="c">&quot;LASTCALL15&quot;🔥</strong> saat pembayaran.<br data-sfc-root="c" data-sfc-pl="|[]" data-sfc-cb="" data-complete="true" data-processed="true" data-copy-service-computed-style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);">Jumlah tiket diskon terbatas &mdash; jangan sampai melewatkan kesempatan Anda.</div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAIBRAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c">Untuk pertama kalinya di Surabai, sebagai bagian dari tur internasional: <strong data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-root="c">Candlelight Concert - Orchestra Experience.</strong></div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAIBhAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c">Untuk pertama kalinya di Surabai&nbsp;dalam rangkaian tur internasional, Orchestra mengundang Anda ke malam yang tak terlupakan dengan musik live yang dikelilingi oleh ribuan lilin yang bersinar.</div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAIBxAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c">Masuklah ke dalam atmosfer di mana setiap nada terasa lebih dekat, lebih dalam, dan lebih hidup. Ini bukan sekadar konser biasa &mdash; ini adalah pengalaman imersif di mana mahakarya klasik dan lagu-lagu hits modern dihadirkan kembali dalam kehangatan cahaya lilin yang intim.</div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAICBAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c">Baik Anda sedang merencanakan malam yang romantis, perayaan spesial, atau sekadar ingin merasakan sesuatu yang luar biasa, malam ini dirancang khusus untuk menyentuh hati Anda.</div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAICRAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c">Program ini menampilkan karya-karya ikonik dari:</div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAIChAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c">🕯 Vivaldi<br data-sfc-root="c" data-sfc-pl="|[]" data-sfc-cb="" data-complete="true" data-processed="true" data-copy-service-computed-style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);">🕯 Beethoven<br data-sfc-root="c" data-sfc-pl="|[]" data-sfc-cb="" data-complete="true" data-processed="true" data-copy-service-computed-style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);">🕯 Ludovico Einaudi<br data-sfc-root="c" data-sfc-pl="|[]" data-sfc-cb="" data-complete="true" data-processed="true" data-copy-service-computed-style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);">🕯 Adele<br data-sfc-root="c" data-sfc-pl="|[]" data-sfc-cb="" data-complete="true" data-processed="true" data-copy-service-computed-style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);">🕯 Hans Zimmer<br data-sfc-root="c" data-sfc-pl="|[]" data-sfc-cb="" data-complete="true" data-processed="true" data-copy-service-computed-style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);">🕯 Soundtrack film paling ikonik dan terkenal sepanjang masa</div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAICxAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c">Dari musik klasik yang tak lekang oleh waktu hingga mahakarya kontemporer dan tema sinematik populer dunia, setiap komposisi akan mengalir dengan kedalaman dan emosi baru, mengubah tempat acara menjadi ruang yang penuh keindahan, kehangatan, dan inspirasi.</div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAIDBAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c">Tempat duduk terbatas. Amankan tiket Anda sekarang dan jadilah bagian dari malam yang tidak akan pernah Anda lupakan.</div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c"><br></div><hr data-sfc-root="c" data-sfc-pl="|[]" data-sfc-cb="" data-complete="true" data-processed="true" data-sae="" data-copy-service-computed-style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; margin: 32px 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(128, 128, 128);"><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAIDhAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c"><br></div><p><img src="https://tm-prod-event-files-v3.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/705583d83d5a11f1911101117567899b/description/a672338b581511f1923401117567899b.jpeg" style="width: 669px;" class="fr-fic fr-dib"><br></p><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAIBBAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c">*Tiket dibeli berdasarkan zona tempat duduk yang dipilih. Tiket tidak ditujukan untuk nomor kursi tertentu. Selama konser berlangsung, tamu dapat memilih kursi yang nyaman di dalam zona yang telah ditentukan.</div><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c"><br></div><hr data-sfc-root="c" data-sfc-pl="|[]" data-sfc-cb="" data-complete="true" data-processed="true" data-sae="" data-copy-service-computed-style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; margin: 32px 0px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(128, 128, 128);"><div data-complete="true" data-copy-service-computed-style='font-family: "Google Sans", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 12px 0px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 0px rgb(10, 10, 10);' data-hveid="CAAIBhAA" data-processed="true" data-sfc-cb="" data-sfc-cp="" data-sfc-root="c"><br></div>
